en.extract:
The Malayan crestless fireback or Malay crestless fireback (Lophura erythrophthalma) is a member of the family Phasianidae. It was previously known as the crestless fireback when it was lumped together with the Bornean crestless fireback. The two species were separated into two monotypic species based on obvious plumage differences, most notably the virtually unmarked dark plumage of the male.
The Malayan crestless fireback is found in the Malay Peninsula and Sumatra.

[[File:Malayan Crestless Fireback by George Edward Lodge.png|left|thumb|Illustration by [[George Edward Lodge]]]]
The '''Malayan crestless fireback''' or '''Malay crestless fireback''' ('''''Lophura erythrophthalma''''') is a member of the family [[Phasianidae]]. It was previously known as the crestless fireback when it was lumped together with the [[Bornean crestless fireback]]. The two species were separated into two [[monotypic species]] based on obvious plumage differences,<ref>{{Cite web |title=The Checklist v2025 |url=http://www.avilist.org/checklist/v2025/ |access-date=2026-01-25 |website=[[AviList]]: The Global Avian Checklist |language=en-US |doi=10.2173/avilist.v2025}}</ref> most notably the virtually unmarked dark plumage of the male.<ref>{{Cite journal|title=Malayan Crestless Fireback (Lophura erythrophthalma), version 1.0|url=https://birdsoftheworld.org/bow/species/crefir5/cur/introduction|journal=Birds of the World|date=2022|issn=2771-3105|doi=10.2173/bow.crefir5.01|language=en|first=Josep|last=del Hoyo|first2=Philip J. K.|last2=McGowan|first3=Guy M.|last3=Kirwan|first4=Nigel|last4=Collar|first5=David|last5=Christie|url-access=subscription}}</ref>

The Malayan crestless fireback is found in the [[Malay Peninsula]] and [[Sumatra]].
